text: Being here, I am struck by the juxtaposition of order and innovation. The first space—an enclosed, sterile meeting room—invites contemplation on structure and human intention to frame communal effort. Beyond the glass walls, the vibrant R+D display catches my eye: bold, creative, experimental. Though both areas serve knowledge, their atmospheres contrast starkly. I sense the tension and harmony between discipline and invention, boundaries and disruption. I feel alert, curious, and humbled, aware of how environments silently shape my thinking and mood.
